records.ety: [OE, grisly, grislich, AS. grislic, gryslic, fr. gr<?/san to shudder; cf. OD. grijselick horrible, OHG. grisenl?ch, and also AS. gre?san to frighten, and E. gruesome.]

defs: Frightful; horrible; dreadful; harsh; as, grisly locks; a grisly specter.
quotes: A man of grisly and stern gravity.
